title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM and embedding wrappers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, multi-user, dark/light themes).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with async, streaming, and embedding helpers.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for chatting and managing models via Ollama.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive terminal chat wrapper with prompt history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and models onto Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration for using Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: FastAPI services, Slack bots, Home-Assistant agents, and more.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for reproducible Ollama builds on Linux and macOS.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-rag-qa
summary: Minimal Streamlit app showing RAG-based Q&A using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that chats in channels or threads using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-gpt-cli
summary: Lightweight Bash script mimicking OpenAI’s CLI but backed by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds AI autocomplete and summarization via Ollama.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing async wrappers for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-email-responder
summary: MCP server that drafts email replies using local Ollama models and IMAP/SMTP.
